description: Natural extraction boundaries identified in the Spring Music codebase

seams.name: Web / API Layer
seams.description: All HTTP controllers handling REST endpoints for albums, health info, and errors
seams.notes: Entry point for all client requests. Depends on domain model and repository abstraction.

seams.name: Domain Model
seams.description: Core business entities — Album, ApplicationInfo, and ID generation utilities
seams.notes: Shared across all layers. JPA annotations couple it to relational persistence; Mongo uses same POJO.

seams.name: Persistence / Repository Layer
seams.description: All store implementations: JPA (H2/MySQL/Postgres), MongoDB, Redis, and in-memory
seams.notes: Four different backends behind one interface. Spring profiles select implementation at runtime.

seams.name: Application Configuration
seams.description: Spring context initializer and Redis-specific bean wiring
seams.notes: Controls which persistence profile is active. Tightly coupled to Cloud Foundry VCAP_SERVICES env vars.

seams.name: Bootstrap / Seed Data
seams.description: Populates the album repository with sample data on startup
seams.notes: Only needed in dev/demo. Hard-codes domain objects. Extracting it breaks no business logic.
